title: . False reporting. It shall be unlawful for any person to make any statement, report, or record file
content:
. False reporting. It shall be unlawful for any person to make any statement, report, or record filed or 
kept pursuant to the provisions of this Code knowing such statement, report or record to be false in any 
material respect. 
Chapter V 
WAGE STUDIES, WAGE AGREEMENTS AND WAGE DETERMINATION
